projects.name: ASCII Donut Animation
projects.tools: React, Vite, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML Canvas
projects.details: This project is a web-based ASCII animation that renders a spinning 3D donut in real-time. Inspired by the mathematical concepts discussed in a1k0n's donut math blog post

projects.name: Breast Cancer Classification Model
projects.details: This project is a machine learning model designed to classify types of breast cancer based on gene expression data. Using both MLP (Multi-Layer Perceptron) and CNN (Convolutional Neural Network) architectures, the model processes high-dimensional DNA data to identify different cancer types. Lasso feature selection is applied to optimize model performance by reducing dimensionality.
